copy.short: FTC Sentinel captures reported fraud only. Most fraud is never reported.
copy.body: The FTC estimates actual fraud losses in 2024 could be as high as $195.9 billion, roughly 15.7x the reported figure. For seniors, the gap is even wider: $2.4B reported versus an estimated $81.5B actual, a 34x multiplier. Every number in this report represents the visible fraction of a much larger problem.
copy.methodology_note: Estimates based on FTC survey data comparing self-reported victimization rates to formal complaint filing rates.
